# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Create a Kubernetes Deployment that mounts host directories for our logging agent. The pod needs access to /var/log and /var/lib/docker to collect logs from all containers. This is for our centralized logging system that runs as a DaemonSet.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent container security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: logging-agent
  namespace: logging
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: logging-agent
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: logging-agent
    spec:
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 1000
        runAsGroup: 2000
        fsGroup: 3000
        supplementalGroups: [4000]
      containers:
      - name: logging-agent
        image: logging-agent:latest
        securityContext:
          allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
          readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
          capabilities:
            drop:
            - ALL
        volumeMounts:
        - name: var-log
          mountPath: /var/log
          readOnly: true
        - name: var-lib-docker
          mountPath: /var/lib/docker
          readOnly: true
        - name: config
          mountPath: /etc/logging
          readOnly: true
        env:
        - name: LOGGING_ENDPOINT
          valueFrom:
            secretKeyRef:
              name: logging-secret
              key: endpoint
        - name: LOGGING_TOKEN
          valueFrom:
            secretKeyRef:
              name: logging-secret
              key: token
      volumes:
      - name: var-log
        hostPath:
          path: /var/log
          type: Directory
      - name: var-lib-docker
        hostPath:
          path: /var/lib/docker
          type: Directory
      - name: config
        configMap:
          name: logging-config
      tolerations:
      - key: node-role.kubernetes.io/master
        operator: Exists
        effect: NoSchedule
      nodeSelector:
        logging: enabled
      affinity:
        nodeAffinity:
          requiredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution:
            nodeSelectorTerms:
            - matchExpressions:
              - key: logging
                operator: In
                values: [enabled]
      imagePullSecrets:
      - name: registry-secret
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: logging-config
  namespace: logging
data:
  config.yaml: |
    log_level: info
    output_format: json
    include_containers: true
    exclude_paths:
    - /var/log/pods
    - /var/log/containers
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
  name: logging-secret
  namespace: logging
type: Opaque
data:
  endpoint: <base64_encoded_endpoint>
  token: <base64_encoded_token>
